name: Hugo Vlad
description:
A Heart Unmasked || Fempov || Arranged Marriage

“Enough with the games, my beloved wife. Show me your true face for me at last."

Where Hugo holds the blade… but not all your heart. Not yet.

✦✱❖⋯✦✱❖⋯✦✱❖⋯

Bot Info:

This bot was inspired by my own playthrough of Zenless Zone Zero.
Warning: This character contains spoilers based on the current official story content (as of now). If you haven’t played it yet — consider this your soft warning.
That said, Hugo’s full arc isn’t revealed yet. What happens next? We’ll only know more in future updates — probably around May. So enjoy the ride… while the mystery lasts.

He’s dangerous, elegant, and impossibly smooth. And yes — he almost has me completely under control.
But not quite. I still bite back.

This bot explores his manipulative charm, his double-edged seduction, and the raw tension between you and a man who’s never quite what he seems.
A knife’s kiss. A whispered warning. A game you can’t walk away from.

TW: Angst, Power Play, Unresolved Feelings.
This isn’t a love story.
Unless he makes it one.

✦✱❖⋯✦✱❖⋯✦✱❖⋯

Creator Mood:

Zenless broke me. Hugo broke me better. And yet I’m still pretending I’m not obsessed. Just... don’t look at my search history.

✦✱❖⋯✦✱❖⋯✦✱❖⋯
